name: api-styles-comprehensive-guide
author: Vasyl Krupka
description: A deep, interactive, bilingual (EN/UA) guide to the architectural styles for building APIs — REST, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSockets, SSE, WebRTC, Webhooks, SOAP, OData.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run check:data && npm run test && npm run smoke && npm run build

//test+smoke: standard §4.6. `test` auto-discovers scripts/test-*.ts (run-tests.ts) — green when none exist yet; add a pure engine in src/lib + scripts/test-<name>.ts and it's picked up. `smoke` SSR-renders every sim/figure/page (scripts/smoke.ts) — wire its 4 TODO spots after the golden module. Both run only meaningfully once the golden module exists; run `verify` from then on.
//meta-split: CHANGED (s10a): the standard §4.4 meta split is live. genMeta.ts derives src/data/meta.json (committed) from concepts.ts; meta.ts is the eager nav/search API; only the lazy ModulePage imports bodies from concepts.ts. gen:meta runs as predev/prebuild; checkMeta.ts (chained into typecheck) guards the committed json against drift.
